description: Implement the lore terminal system and environmental storytelling. Terminals scattered throughout the station contain text logs (crew audio logs, corporate memos, research notes) that reveal the backstory of Kharon-7 across multiple runs.
acceptance_criteria: Terminal objects can be placed in rooms via the room template data.
Given the player stands adjacent to a terminal and presses interact, when the terminal is active, then a text log overlay displays with the log content.
At least 15 unique lore entries exist across the 3 MVP sectors, organized chronologically to reveal the station's backstory.
Lore entries are categorized: crew personal logs, corporate memos (with dark humor), and research notes (alien discovery).
Decoded/read terminals are tracked in a persistent codex that survives between runs.
Terminals in unpowered rooms display as dark/inactive and cannot be read until the room is powered.
A lore codex screen (accessible from the ship) shows all collected entries organized by category.
notes: Spec: 'Terminal text logs, basic environmental storytelling.' Lore entries are pure text — no voice acting. Include corporate memos with gallows humor per the tone direction. Store read-entries in localStorage.
